title: Rich Earthy Malaysian Chicken Curry
description: A monsoon-inspired Malaysian dish featuring chicken cooked in a rich and earthy curry sauce with ground almonds, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This Whole30-friendly recipe is pressure-cooked to perfection.
instructions: Heat oil in the pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the ground almonds, coconut milk, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Close the lid and cook at high pressure for 10 minutes.
Let the pressure release naturally for 10 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure.
Stir the curry and serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
